title: Nonschool Use of School Facilities: Distribution of Nonschool Literature
description: This policy governs the distribution of literature and printed materials on school property by non-school groups or individuals. It establishes content limitations on what types of materials may be distributed, including restrictions tied to other district policies. The policy also addresses the Superintendent's role in developing procedures to ensure compliance with these distribution rules.

timeline_local.summary: This update to Conroe ISD's GKDA (Local) policy adds two new provisions: a tenth content limitation banning distribution of materials that promote concepts prohibited under Board Policies EFA, EFB, EMB, and EMI (Local), and a new "Superintendent Authority" section requiring the Superintendent to develop compliance procedures and certify compliance to the Board no later than February 1, 2026.
changes_added: 10. The materials promote concepts described in the prohibited concepts of Board Policies EFA (Local), EFB (Local), EMB (Local) and EMI (Local).

Superintendent Authority: The Superintendent shall develop policies and procedures to ensure compliance with this Policy. The Superintendent shall certify to the Board of Trustees that the District complies with this Policy not later than February 1, 2026.
timeline_local.notes: Red underlined text was clearly identifiable on pages 2 and 3. No red strikethrough (removal) text was present in the document. The cover page title "Discuss and Possibly Adopt Revisions to Board Policy GKDA (Local)" maps to action = 'adopted'.
